note: Top-N or bottom-N rank conditional formatting. Add via `add /Sheet1/cf --type topn --prop sqref=A1:A100 --prop rank=10`. Aliases for type: top10, top. Lookup: Add.Cf.cs:577 (AddCfExtended `topn` case); Get: Query.cs:545.

rank.description: number (or percent) of items to highlight. Default 10. Required >= 1.

percent.description: interpret rank as a percentage (true) or absolute count (false, default).

bottom.description: highlight bottom-N instead of top-N (default false).

stopIfTrue.description: stop evaluating subsequent CF rules when this rule applies.

type.description: canonical CF rule type token (e.g. "dataBar", "colorScale", "iconSet", "formula", "topN", "cellIs", "containsText", "aboveAverage", "duplicateValues", "uniqueValues", "timePeriod"). Emitted on every CF rule.

dxfId.description: differential format id referencing dxf styles. Emitted only when present on the rule.
